case_title: DPM, INCORPORATED, A CALIF CORPORATION vs. ANDRES, ANSELMO DBA SAKURA OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DPM, INCORPORATED, A CALIF CORPORATION
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDRES, ANSELMO DBA SAKURA OF SAN FRANCISCO

10:00AM C/C FOR TRIAL ALL PARTIES PRESENT. STIPULATION REACHED. TERMS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF. RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 282 O'FARRELL ST. RENTS AND DAMGAES $16800.00 THRU 12/31/93. WRIT TO ISSUE BUT STAYED UNTIL 12/31/93, MIDNIGHT. DEFENDANT TO REMOVE ALL POSSESSION AND BELONGINGS. DEFENDANT TO PAY 20,400.00 TO PLAINTIFF BY 12/15/93 DEFENDANT MAY SUB LET. EACH SIDES TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT/STIPULATION.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DPM, INCORPORATED, A CALIF CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRES, ANSELMO DBA SAKURA OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
